scripts.build: vite build && node scripts/copy-runtime-assets.mjs && node scripts/verify-offline-bundle.mjs
scripts.check: npm run validate:versions && node --check dense-loader.js && node --check compiled-app.js && node --check hard-mode-v3.js && node --check compiled-level-source.js && node --check interaction-fix.js && node --check mobile-enhancements.js && node --check analytics-enhancements.js && node --check sw.js && node --check src/app/bootstrap.js && node --check src/app/content-integrity.js && node --check src/app/native-bridge.js && node --check src/app/mobile-shell.js && node --check src/analytics/analytics.js && node --check src/content/content-registry.js && node --check src/game/input-geometry.js && node --check src/game/input-controller.js && node --check src/game/progression.js && node --check src/storage/save-migrations.js && node --check src/storage/save-store.js && node --check src/accessibility/accessibility.js && node --check scripts/ensure-ios-privacy-manifest.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-store-readiness.mjs && npm test && npm run validate:levels && npm run validate:store
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.mobile:add:ios: npm run build && npx cap add ios
scripts.mobile:add:android: npm run build && npx cap add android
scripts.mobile:ios: npm run mobile:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.mobile:android: npm run mobile:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.mobile:run:ios: npm run build && npx cap run ios
scripts.mobile:run:android: npm run build && npx cap run android
scripts.store:prepare: npm run prepare:build && npm run check && npm run build
scripts.store:android:aab: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease --no-daemon
scripts.store:ios:archive: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -archivePath build/ToxicTeddies.xcarchive CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO archive
